title: conda next-available version finder
description: List the versions an anaconda.org channel advertises (conda packages are NOT PyPI packages — distinct registry, conda's own dotted+build version grammar), rank candidates above the current version, and dry-run conda solves (--dry-run --json) to find the next version that actually resolves — no real environment mutation.
safety: dry-run solve parsed from --json — no environment mutation; mock runs are synthetic — zero network, zero subprocess
